title: Throws With Deadly Accuracy
summary: Everything that leaves your hand goes exactly where you’d like it to go and at the range and speed to make the perfect impact.
tiers: Tier 3: Quick Throw or Skill With Defense
Tier 6: Lethal Damage or Mastery With Defense
gm_intrusions: Missed attacks strike the wrong target. Ricochets can be dangerous. Improvised weapons break.
text: Everything that leaves your hand goes exactly where you’d like it to go and at the range and speed to make the perfect impact.
details: Everything that leaves your hand goes exactly where you’d like it to go and at the range and speed to make the perfect impact.
